question: Chapters
feedback: The text clearly outlines the progression of the theoretical part, moving from the pre-digital era to the early digitalization era, then to modern approaches (third chapter), and finally to tools and methods.

question: Description
feedback: Each section is well-described, covering specific themes such as data collection methods, transition challenges, real-time capabilities, and specific analytical tools like AI and signal processing.

question: Structure
feedback: The logical flow is very clear; the reader can easily understand the chronological and thematic progression of the thesis from historical context to modern technological applications.
